title: Revoked November 2018
text:
2403. Breach of Employment Contract—Unspeciﬁed Term—Implied-in-Fact Promise Not to
Discharge Without Good Cause
2404. Breach of Employment Contract—Unspeciﬁed Term—“Good Cause” Deﬁned
2405. Breach of Implied Employment Contract—Unspeciﬁed Term—“Good Cause”
Deﬁned—Misconduct
